description: A mixed reading and geometry pack with vocabulary images, shape media, and 3D object prompts.

questions.question: Sam was determined to finish his homework even though he was tired. What does determined mean?

hint.title: Use the whole sentence
hint.text: Sam is tired, but he still wants to finish. That tells you he will keep trying.

media.title: Vocabulary clue
media.caption: The sentence gives a clue about not giving up.

questions.question: Look at the 3D object on the screen. What is its name?

hint.title: Flat square faces
hint.text: A cube has six square faces and all its edges are the same length.

payload.setup: const geo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(1.8, 1.8, 1.8); const mat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x3772ff, metalness: 0.18, roughness: 0.32 }); const mesh = new THREE.Mesh(geo, mat); mesh.name = 'shape'; scene.add(mesh); const edge = new THREE.LineSegments(new THREE.EdgesGeometry(geo), new THREE.LineBasicMaterial({ color: 0xffffff })); mesh.add(edge); camera.position.z = 4.4;
payload.update: const m = scene.getObjectByName('shape'); if (m) { m.rotation.x += 0.01; m.rotation.y += 0.015; }

questions.question: Mia peered through the window to see outside in the dark. What does peered mean?

hint.title: Window clue
hint.text: If it is dark outside, Mia needs to look carefully to see.

media.alt: A child reading near a dark window with the phrase look carefully
media.caption: Peered means looked carefully, often because something is hard to see.

questions.question: A square tile was placed on the floor. How many sides does a square have?

hint.title: Count the edges
hint.text: A square has four equal sides and four corners.

media.alt: A colorful gallery showing a square, circle, and triangle
media.caption: The blue square has four straight sides.

questions.question: The puzzle was very intriguing, so Ben kept thinking about it. What does intriguing mean?

hint.title: Thinking clue
hint.text: If Ben keeps thinking about it, the puzzle probably caught his attention.

questions.question: Look at the 3D object on the screen. What is its name?

hint.title: Ball shape
hint.text: A sphere is round in every direction, like a ball.

payload.setup: const geo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(1.28, 36, 36); const mat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0xffcf4a, metalness: 0.14, roughness: 0.3 }); const mesh = new THREE.Mesh(geo, mat); mesh.name = 'shape'; scene.add(mesh); const ring = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.TorusGeometry(1.7, 0.035, 12, 80), new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color: 0x16b8a6 })); ring.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2; scene.add(ring); camera.position.z = 4.6;

questions.question: Jack ran recklessly across the busy road. What does recklessly mean?

hint.title: Danger clue
hint.text: A busy road is dangerous. Recklessly means acting without thinking about that danger.

media.title: Spot the risky action
media.caption: The road clue points to danger.

questions.question: A slice of pizza was shaped like a triangle. How many sides does a triangle have?

hint.title: Triangle clue
hint.text: The word tri means three. A triangle has three sides.

media.title: Triangle side count
media.caption: Count each edge around the outside.

questions.question: The bird hovered in the air without landing. What does hovered mean?
options: stayed in one place in the air
questions.correctAnswer: stayed in one place in the air

hint.title: No landing
hint.text: The sentence says the bird was in the air and did not land.

media.title: Hover means stay up
media.caption: Something hovering stays in one place above the ground.

questions.question: Look at the 3D object on the screen. What is its name?

hint.title: Two circles
hint.text: A cylinder has a circle on the top and a circle on the bottom.

payload.setup: const geo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.9, 0.9, 2.1, 40); const mat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x16b8a6, metalness: 0.16, roughness: 0.36 }); const mesh = new THREE.Mesh(geo, mat); mesh.name = 'shape'; scene.add(mesh); const top = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.TorusGeometry(0.92, 0.045, 12, 60), new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color: 0xffffff })); top.position.y = 1.05; top.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2; scene.add(top); camera.position.z = 4.8;

questions.question: Sarah waited in anticipation for her birthday surprise. What does anticipation mean?
options: happy waiting for something to happen
questions.correctAnswer: happy waiting for something to happen

hint.title: Waiting clue
hint.text: A birthday surprise is exciting. Anticipation is the feeling of waiting for something to happen.

questions.question: A warning sign was shaped like a triangle. How many corners does a triangle have?

hint.title: Corners match sides
hint.text: A triangle has three sides, and those sides meet at three corners.

media.title: Triangle corners
media.caption: Count the pointed corners of the triangle.

questions.question: The teacher smiled and beckoned the child to come closer. What does beckoned mean?

hint.title: Come closer clue
hint.text: The phrase come closer tells you the teacher made a signal to invite the child.

media.title: A friendly signal
media.caption: Beckoned means used a gesture to call someone closer.
